meta.title: Municipal Impact Reports
meta.description: Prepare Caring Community reporting for verified hours, active members, trusted organisations, and municipal value conversations.

export_note.pdf_text: is formatted for sharing with municipal partners and funders.
export_note.csv_text: gives raw data for spreadsheet analysis or grant reporting.

about.title: About this report
about.body_1_before_kiss: The Municipal Impact Report is the evidence pack you share with municipal partners, cantons, and funders to demonstrate the programme's value. It shows verified care hours, active members, partner organisations, and, using the
about.body_1_after_kiss: methodology, an estimated cost offset to formal care services (
about.body_1_after_chf: value of hours x prevention multiplier).
about.body_2_after_audience: toggle to switch the narrative framing:
about.body_2_after_canton: aggregates multiple municipalities and shows cost-avoidance at cantonal scale;
about.body_2_after_municipality: focuses on local residents reached and partner organisations;
about.body_2_after_cooperative: shows member retention, reciprocity rate, and coordinator workload. Export as PDF to send to partners or as CSV for further analysis. Save report templates to quickly regenerate the same configuration in future periods.

audience_selector.title: Audience
audience_selector.description: Switch the narrative framing. Only the selected audience section is included in the PDF/CSV export.

filters.title: Reporting window
filters.description: Use explicit dates when preparing canton, municipality, foundation, or cooperative packs.

readiness_intro.prefix: These four signals indicate whether the report has enough data to be convincing to an external audience.
readiness_intro.needs_data_suffix: = metric is below threshold - hover each card for guidance.

municipal_value.what: Estimated cost offset to formal care (hours x policy hour value x prevention multiplier).
municipal_value.fix: No cost offset calculable yet. Approve pending volunteer hour logs to populate this metric.

participation.what: Distinct members active as supporters or recipients in this period.
participation.fix: Below the minimum participation threshold. Continue onboarding members and completing exchanges.

partner_network.what: Trusted partner organisations that contributed hours in this period.
partner_network.fix: No trusted organisations active. Onboard organisations via Volunteering > Organisations.

local_exchange.what: Verified exchanges (completed and approved) recorded in this period.
local_exchange.fix: No completed exchanges yet. Coordinators should approve pending hour logs.

empty.categories: No completed support categories in this period.
empty.trends: No verified activity trend is available for this period.

toast.load_failed: Failed to load municipal impact data.
toast.export_failed: Failed to export the municipal report.
toast.template_save_failed: Failed to save the report template.
toast.template_delete_failed: Failed to delete the report template.

templates.title: Saved report templates
templates.description: Prepare repeatable municipal, canton, cooperative, or foundation report packs with the right audience, period, and value assumptions.

placeholders.name: e.g. Q3 2025 Canton Report for Funders
placeholders.description: Optional note for future reference - e.g. 'Used for annual AGM presentation'

descriptions.audience: Determines the narrative framing and which sections appear in the PDF/CSV export.
descriptions.period: Default reporting window applied when no manual date filter is set.
descriptions.hour_value: Local formal-care hourly rate for cost-offset calculation (e.g. CHF 35 for Switzerland). Leave blank to use the tenant default.

templates.delete_confirm: Delete template "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

canton.empty_description: Aggregate impact across municipalities, cost-avoidance, and year-over-year change.
canton.empty_body: Switch to Canton mode to load the canton-level narrative.
canton.title: Verified support hours{{tenant}} - {{from}} to {{to}}
canton.description: Aggregate impact across municipalities, professional-care cost avoidance, year-over-year trend.
canton.municipalities_reporting_desc: Aggregate node count contributing to this view.
canton.estimated_cost_avoidance_desc: Hours x policy value x {{multiplier}} (professional-care equivalency).

municipality.empty_description: Local participation, named partner organisations, geographic / category split.
municipality.empty_body: Switch to Municipality mode to load the municipality-level narrative.
municipality.title: Community impact - {{from}} to {{to}}
municipality.description: Local participation, named partner organisations, geographic / category split, recipient reach.
municipality.no_partner_activity: No partner activity in this period.
municipality.no_category_data: No category data in this period.

cooperative.empty_description: Member retention, hour reciprocity, tandem relationships, coordinator workload, future-care credit pool.
cooperative.empty_body: Switch to Cooperative mode to load the cooperative-internal narrative.
cooperative.title: Cooperative internal report - {{from}} to {{to}}
cooperative.description: Internal cooperative health: retention, reciprocity, tandems, coordinator load, credit pool.
cooperative.member_retention_desc: {{count}} members active in both this period and the prior equivalent period.
cooperative.reciprocity_rate_desc: {{count}} supporters also received hours in the period.
cooperative.future_care_credit_pool_desc: Sum of positive member balances - the cooperative's implicit future-care reserve. Active member base: {{count}}.

verified_hours.title: Verified hours and economic value
verified_hours.description: Summarise approved support hours, transaction volume, active contributors, and estimated value.

active_members.title: Member reach and inclusion
active_members.description: Track active members, new joiners, inactive members, and groups that need coordinator attention.

organisations.title: Organisation and partner activity
organisations.description: Show participating organisations, opportunities, verified logs, and coordinator workflows.

trust_pack.title: Trust, safeguarding, and compliance
trust_pack.description: Surface verification, review, safeguarding, consent, and audit signals for sensitive care coordination.
